---
title: "First public release of FruitMeasureApp"
date: 2026-03-10
categories: [release]
description: "FruitMeasureApp is now available on mobile platforms."
image: ../../../assets/logos/logo.png
author: "author name"
---

<!-- This is a sample blog post announcing the first public release of FruitMeasureApp. It includes a brief overview of the features included in this release and a look at what future updates will focus on. The content is structured with headings and bullet points for clarity. -->

## First release

We are pleased to announce the first public release of FruitMeasureApp.

This version includes:

- Mobile application (Android and iOS)  
- AI-based fruit detection and measurement  
- Support for multiple fruits per image  
- Calibration using a reference marker  

---

## What’s next

Future updates will focus on:

- Improving accuracy  
- Expanding supported crops  
- Enhancing usability in field conditions
